parameters.query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_sessions WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE) as today_sessions,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_sessions WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days') as week_sessions,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_messages WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE) as today_messages,
  (SELECT ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (last_activity - created_at)) / 60)::numeric, 1) FROM chat_sessions WHERE last_activity > created_at AND created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days') as avg_duration_minutes;

WITH session_data AS (
  SELECT 
    s.id,
    s.created_at,
    s.last_activity,
    COUNT(m.id) as message_count,
    (SELECT content FROM chat_messages WHERE session_id = s.id AND role = 'user' ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT 1) as first_message,
    (SELECT intent FROM chat_messages WHERE session_id = s.id AND intent IS NOT NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1) as primary_intent
  FROM chat_sessions s
  LEFT JOIN chat_messages m ON s.id = m.session_id
  GROUP BY s.id
  ORDER BY s.created_at DESC
  LIMIT {{ $json.limit }} OFFSET {{ $json.offset }}
)
SELECT * FROM session_data;
SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM chat_sessions;

SELECT 
  s.id,
  s.created_at,
  s.last_activity,
  s.metadata
FROM chat_sessions s
WHERE s.id = '{{ $json.session_id }}'::uuid;

SELECT role, content, created_at, intent, source_type
FROM chat_messages
WHERE session_id = '{{ $json.session_id }}'::uuid
ORDER BY created_at ASC;

SELECT DATE(created_at) as date, COUNT(*) as count
FROM chat_sessions
WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '{{ $json.days }} days'
GROUP BY DATE(created_at)
ORDER BY date;

SELECT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM created_at)::int as hour, COUNT(*) as count
FROM chat_messages
WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '{{ $json.days }} days'
GROUP BY EXTRACT(HOUR FROM created_at)
ORDER BY hour;

SELECT COALESCE(intent, 'general') as intent, COUNT(*) as count
FROM chat_messages
WHERE role = 'assistant' AND created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '{{ $json.days }} days'
GROUP BY intent
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT content as question, COUNT(*) as count
FROM chat_messages
WHERE role = 'user' AND created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '{{ $json.days }} days'
GROUP BY content
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 10;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ today_sessions: $('Query Stats').first().json.today_sessions || 0, week_sessions: $('Query Stats').first().json.week_sessions || 0, today_messages: $('Query Stats').first().json.today_messages || 0, avg_duration_minutes: parseFloat($('Query Stats').first().json.avg_duration_minutes) || 0 }) }}
